name: AI Short-Form Video Script Generator
description: Claude AI creates professional short-form video scripts with AI image prompts, scene breakdowns, and voiceover text, then posts the scripts to both Discord and Slack for team review and production.

source.originalName: AI-powered short-form video generator with OpenAI, Flux, Kling, and ElevenLabs

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting video scripts

discordKey.description: Discord connection key for posting video scripts

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post video scripts (e.g. '#video-scripts')

discordChannelId.description: Discord channel ID to post video scripts

topic.description: Topic or theme for the short-form video (e.g. 'productivity tips', 'cooking hacks')

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for short-form video script
Run Claude AI to create video script
Parse Claude AI output and strip fences
Build Discord embed for video script
Build Slack Block Kit message for video script
